meta.benchmark: all-Neumann unit box (Table-1 setup), complex field
meta.note: Row (a) of tab:schemes includes the Robin surface closure; the box has no free surface, so timings cover interior + Neumann closure.

meta.benchmark: all-Neumann unit box, interior mean-removed rel-L2 (paper_benchmarks._neumann_box, identical to tab:neumann)

meta.operators: G = stacked renormalised gradients (2N x N); D = [Gx, Gy]; L = FIRM trace-normalised Laplacian, interior rows only (DG restricted to the same rows)
meta.norms: 2-norm via 60 power iterations on A^T A; Frobenius cross-check

meta.benchmark: B5 jittered wedge tank (paper Sec 5.5 geometry)
meta.marrone: eigmin of moment matrix M_i normalised by full-support value m0 = pi h^4/(40 dx^2); flag if < 0.75 (Marrone et al. 2010 threshold)
meta.sigma: fc.particle_operator smoothstep activation, flag if sigma_i > 0
meta.ground_truth: ring: d_surf < dx (must flag); interior: d_surf > h & d_wall > h (must not flag); wall band: d_wall < h & d_surf > h, reported separately because Marrone has no wall information

meta.protocol: eigenvalues of A_s = -diag(N_i) A (row-scaled closed operator, approximates the continuous -Laplacian nodewise); ARPACK shift-invert eigs(k=8, sigma=-1, which='LM'), sorted by |lambda|; medians over seeds; disorder % = 2017 chaos, jitter = disorder/200
meta.boundary_mask: rows within h=2.5dx of a wall/surface (assembly's is_bnd flags)
meta.neg_offdiag: off-diagonal entries of the assembled A (= W_ij w_ij; negative entry <=> sign-flipped correction weight / ghost-folded coeff), |entry| > 1e-13*rowmax
meta.tank: wedge tank (capstone TANK, FILL_H=1.8), GGP walls, disorder 30% only; 'ghost_natural' uses the detected smoothstep surface (capstone default), '*_exact' the exact surface closure

meta.note: Robin-parity reflection ghost vs the bvp.py diagonal-Robin closure on identical clouds; median over seeds; sum normalisation N=2d/sum(W|x|^2 w) on the ghost rows
